entities.name: ISO Week Grouping

relationships.context: Python scripts query SQLite database to load health metrics
Sleep data is stored in and loaded from the daily_sleep table
Exercise data is bucketed into ISO weeks keyed by Monday start date
Resting HR data points loaded from SQLite with date filtering
